caption: The video showcases two MiiR products against a solid teal background. On the left, there is a tall, white 750 ml bottle with a sleek design and a black cap. To its right, a shorter, white 10 oz tumbler with a silver lid is displayed. Both items feature the MiiR logo prominently on their surfaces. The video likely highlights the size comparison between the two products, emphasizing their capacity and design. The text labels "750 ml Bottle" and "10 oz Tumbler" appear next to each item, providing clear information about their respective sizes. The overall presentation is clean and minimalistic, focusing on the products' features and branding.
